title: Craftable Command Block
description: This mod adds a few new items, advancements and, of course, a way to create, place and mine the Command Block in survival mode.
body:
## Craftable Command Block
This mod adds a few items, crafting recipes, tools, advancements and a way to create, place and destroy the command block!
This mod was inspired by [Cracker's Wither Storm Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/crackers-wither-storm-mod) and is meant to make it possible to resummon the Wither Storm (please be aware that this project are not affiliated with nonamecrackers2 in any way).

#### Crafting recipes are located in the gallery.

---

This mod has been created with [MCreator](https://www.mcreator.net/).

---

### The small help guide

The crafting recipes for the command block are in the gallery. If you want to remove the command block from where you placed it, simply right-click the command block with the Energy Core Staff.

### Advancement information

There are 4 hidden advancements of the challenge-type. You can get all 4 of these by defeating each vanilla Minecraft boss (Ender Dragon, Wither, Elder Guardian and Warden)
